[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 100111111 7
2 101111111 8
3 110011111 7
4 111111101 8
5 111111111 a
6 011110011 6
7 111011110 7

01 10 011110011 6 match 6
12 21 101110111 7
23 32 100110111 6
34 43 100111111 7 match 1
45 54 110111111 8
56 65 011110111 7
67 76 111011110 7 match 7
70 07 111001111 7

02 20 111010111 7
13 31 101110111 7
24 42 100111111 7 match 1
35 53 110110111 7
46 64 111111111 a match 0 5
57 75 111111111 a match 0 5
60 06 011010111 6
71 17 111111111 a match 0 5

03 30 111110101 7
14 41 101111111 8 match 2
25 52 110110111 7
36 63 111110111 8
47 74 111111111 a match 0 5
50 05 011110011 6 match 6
61 16 011110111 7
72 27 111011111 8

04 40 111111111 a match 0 5
15 51 011110011 6 match 6
26 62 111010111 7
37 73 111111111 a match 0 5
